app.name: Cosmic Echo Journal
app.tagline: Your personal behavior metaphor & reflection journal

morning.greeting: Good morning. Today's cosmic echo awaits.
morning.question: Reflection Question
morning.noEntry: Tap above to draw your card
morning.pickManualHint: Tap cards. Upright or reversed will be decided by the cosmos.

evening.title: Evening Journal
evening.subtitle: What happened today
evening.placeholder: Write about your feelings, what happened, inner movements… no structure needed, just honest notes.

shareCard.title: Share Card
shareCard.subtitle: Turn today's insight into a beautiful card for someone you care about.

cases.title: Case Collection
cases.subtitle: Case Collection
cases.comingSoonDesc: Tap the + button to record your first divination case
cases.questionPlaceholder: What do you want to explore through divination?
cases.photoHint: Upload a photo of your spread
cases.tapToPick: Tap a position to pick a card
cases.notesPlaceholder: Record your intuition, feelings, or interpretation at the time…
cases.reviewPlaceholder: Looking back: did the event unfold? Was the prediction accurate? Any new insights?

forest.title: Cosmic Forest
forest.subtitle: Cosmic Forest
forest.statusDesc: You are building new possibilities, gradually exploring and understanding your true self.
forest.treeQuote: Your tree is reaching outward — new branches represent new possibilities, while roots must dig deeper into your inner self.
forest.unlockDesc: Unlock "Lush Branches" — Flowers bloom in moonlight

detail.analysisDesc: Based on weekly and monthly report structure model updates
detail.formChangeDesc: Your tree is reaching out with new branches. Roots are also digging deeper inward.
detail.previewDesc: As stability and introspection continue to improve, the tree will enter a more stable structure-building phase.
detail.monthlyQuoteText: Growth doesn't happen overnight — it accumulates through every choice. Keep rooting inward, growing outward.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or return to the home page.

starter.title: Build your next app with Eazo
starter.subtitle: Demo artifacts are removed. You now have a clean foundation with auth, data access, and platform integrations ready for your product.

readDocs.title: Read the docs
readDocs.desc: Open AGENTS.md and README.md to understand the template architecture.

replacePage.title: Replace this page
replacePage.desc: Move your product UI into src/components and keep page.tsx thin.

firstFeature.title: Build your first feature
firstFeature.desc: Add API routes under src/app/api and call them from typed helpers.

translations.title: Add translations
translations.desc: Edit en-US / zh-CN strings in src/i18n/locales. LanguageSwitcher and I18nProvider in layout.tsx are already wired.

nextCommand.title: Next command
nextCommand.desc: Start developing and iterate in real time.
